creator: lumiwa@gmail.com
text:
I am using FreeBSD 14.0 Release-p5 and Openbox with tint2 and
yesterday I did pkg upgrade and and after restart computer, run
openbox and surprisse tint shows and after few seconds dissaper. It
complain bout volumeicon and parcellite. I disable those two but it
didn't solve the problem.
If I run tint in teminal, panel shows but when I moving a mouse it dissapers again and I got:

$ tint2
tint2: Using glib slice allocator (default). Run tint2 with environment variable G_SLICE=always-malloc in case of strange behavior or crashes
tint2: xRandr: Found crtc's: 4
tint2: xRandr: Linking output eDP-1 with crtc 0, resolution 1920x1080, DPI 157
tint2: xRandr: Linking output DP-3 with crtc 1, resolution 2560x1440, DPI 123
tint2: xRandr: crtc 2 seems disabled
tint2: xRandr: crtc 3 seems disabled
tint2: No XSETTINGS manager, tint2 uses config option 'launcher_icon_theme'.
tint2: Loading config file: /home/ajtim/.config/tint2/tint2rc
tint2: real transparency off.... depth: 24
tint2: panel items: LTSCB
tint2: Systray composited rendering off
tint2: systray_asb forced to 100 0 0
tint2: nb monitors 2, nb monitors used 2, nb desktops 2
tint2: panel 1 uses scale 1 
tint2: Loading icon theme cache...
tint2: Could not open file /home/ajtim/.local/share/applications/firefox.desktop
tint2: panel 2 uses scale 1 
tint2: Could not open file /home/ajtim/.local/share/applications/firefox.desktop
tint2: systray window 12582929
tint2: systray started
add_icon: 14680105 (), pid 12646, visual 0x2b11a2699040, colormap 14680080, depth 24, width 22, height 22
Memory fault(coredump)

Thank you very much.
P.S.
Is it possible that is "guilty" upgraded xf86-input-synaptics?
